questions.question: Describe the difference between a Combinational Circuit and a Sequential Circuit. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Please explain in your own words

questions.question: Design a 4-bit Full Adder using Combinational Logic. Calculate the outputs of the adder for the inputs A = 0, B = 0, C = 0, and S = 0.
questions.hint: You can use truth tables to find the outputs

questions.question: A 4-to-2 Multiplexer is used to select one of four inputs (A, B, C, D) based on a 2-bit select line (S1, S0). If S1 = 0 and S0 = 1, what is the output of the Multiplexer?
questions.hint: Use the Multiplexer truth table to find the answer
